channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: Continuous coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Massive funeral for Iran's slain supreme leader enters second day
item.description: The multi-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in February by U.S.-Israeli strikes, has featured calls for vengeance.

item.title: Prosecutors to lay out their case against the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
7/5: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Ed O'Keefe interviews NCAA President Charlie Baker. Also featuring Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos...
